note: Phase 1 seed. SpotBugs codes use bug-pattern prefixes (NP = null-pointer, DLS = dead local store, NM = naming, UC = useless code). Hydra R3 owns the SECURITY category and find-sec-bugs plugin output.

correctness_m1.description: Null-path, concurrency, numeric, and resource-leak bug patterns. Routed to M1 / M5.

idiom_m7.description: Java idiom / best-practice signals (useless code, redundant operations). Routed to M7 (Idiom-fit).

complexity_m7.description: PMD/checkstyle-side complexity signals (cyclomatic, NPath, too-many-methods). Routed to M7 (Simplicity).

naming_m7.description: SpotBugs NM-series naming-convention violations. Routed to M7 (Clarity).

testability_m7.description: JUnit / test-structure anti-patterns (missing assertions, ignored tests, static mocks). Routed to M7 (Testability). Phase 1 seed.

security_defer_to_hydra.description: find-sec-bugs + SpotBugs SECURITY category — Hydra R3 owns these (CWE lane). Listed for provenance; never mapped.
